title: Dragging a slab line vertex handle in the 3D viewport
capture_instructions: Split-viewport layout. In the 3D viewport, show the slab center line with both vertex handles visible. Capture a moment where one of the handles is being dragged — the cursor should be over a handle (or show the handle in a highlighted/hover state). The slab line should appear in a slightly different position than expected, indicating a drag is in progress or just completed.
ui_state: Plan/Profile active, slab line visible in 3D with vertex handles, one handle being dragged

annotations.label: Click and drag a handle to reposition it
